title: Associate Relationship Manager
description:
About the Role:

We’re looking for a motivated and client-focused Associate Relationship Manager to join our growing team. You’ll play a key role in supporting the financial needs of SME and individual clients, building long-term relationships while gaining hands-on exposure in a professional and dynamic environment.

This is an excellent opportunity for candidates with early experience in finance, banking, or client-facing roles who are eager to grow their career in relationship management.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Manage and develop a portfolio of SME and/or high-net-worth individual clients
  • Identify client needs and provide tailored financial solutions and services
  • Conduct onboarding, KYC, and risk assessments in compliance with internal and regulatory requirements
  • Assist in structuring financing proposals or investment solutions with guidance from senior RMs
  • Maintain strong client relationships through regular engagement and reviews
  • Support cross-selling efforts and identify upsell opportunities
  • Ensure prompt resolution of client queries and coordinate with internal teams as needed
  • Stay updated on financial products, market trends, and compliance developments

Requirements:

  • Diploma or Degree in Finance, Business, Banking, or related field
  • 1–3 years of experience in relationship management, banking, or client advisory roles
  • Able to manage multiple accounts and deliver timely follow-ups
  • Experience in SME or lending-related portfolios is a bonus

Why Join Us?

  • Competitive salary up to $6,000/month + incentives
  • Learn and grow alongside experienced senior RMs
  • Exposure to a wide range of financial products and SME portfolios
  • Professional yet supportive working environment

postedCompany.description:
Wecruit is one of the leading recruitment firms based in Singapore, dedicated to helping job seekers find the right career opportunities.


We partner with reputable companies across a wide range of industries, including Healthcare, IT, Corporate Support, Engineering, Education, Logistics & Supply Chain, Oil & Gas, and Maritime. 


Whether you're looking for permanent roles or short-term assignments, our consultants take the time to understand your experience, preferences, and goals to match you with suitable roles.

With over 1,000 successful placements and a strong track record of candidate satisfaction, Wecruit is here to support your career journey.


Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
